strings.string: ON = crew view (no HR / pace). OFF = runner view.
Total race duration in hours (6, 12 or 24).
Length of one loop in meters (default 1185.6).
How many loops by the fastest fictive runner fill one full revolution of the display ring (default 6).
Within this window after a lap press: 2nd quick press = caught a missed lap (+1 extra). 3+ quick presses = undo last lap. Default 5 s.
